title: rhododendron kiyosumense subsp. kiyosumense
intro: Rhododendron kiyosumense subsp. kiyosumense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, native to Japan, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Rhododendron kiyosumense subsp. kiyosumense is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
